summary: Successfully assembled all 4 panels into cohesive candidate profile document for Gamma generation. Panel 1 (Thesis) captures founding builder potential with production impact. Panel 2 (Hard Skills) systematically assesses JD requirements with 'Bar Not Cleared' verdict due to Node.js/vector DB gaps. Panel 3 (Differentiators) identifies 3 rare combinations: Elite Problem-Solving + Pragmatic Impact, Founding-to-Scale Ownership, and Full-Stack AI Delivery. Panel 4 (Why This Meeting Matters) synthesizes findings to frame exploration areas: remote/async adaptation, LLM production guardrails depth, and knowledge sharing in public. All panels properly evidenced and cross-panel consistency validated.
learnings: Panel briefs vs. actual content: Build documentation must clearly distinguish between task instructions (briefs) and synthesized output (content) to prevent assembly confusion
Cross-panel consistency: Thesis positive tone vs. Hard Skills 'Bar Not Cleared' verdict is intentional contrast - appropriately signals high-potential-but-imperfect-match candidate
Quality gate efficiency: Standardized panel structure (content + evidence + reasoning) enables systematic review and faster validation
